display_text: Cost: 55: Consumable tree planting item that provides a minor +1 to all attributes permanently. Primarily used to block creep paths, create juke spots, or provide vision blockers. Planting a tree also eats the Iron Branch, converting it into a lasting utility object. Stats: Tree Duration: 20s, All Attributes: +1.

display_text: Cost: 55: Cost-efficient starting item purchased for its cheap +1 to all attributes, slightly improving health, mana, and damage for the laning phase. The single-use tree planting ability allows for creative vision and movement control in the early game. Stats: Cost: 55, All Attributes: +1.
search_text: starting item, early game stats, laning item, cheap stats, all attributes branch, early game utility, starting branch, lane sustain, Iron Branch

display_text: Cost: 55: Situationally used to eat with a Tango for double healing or to block neutral camps from spawning. Planting a tree can be used to temporarily block paths or create obstacles during fights. It is also a common component in upgrading to basic items like Magic Wand. Stats: All Attributes: +1.
